The community website you are looking at right now — built with Astro, Tailwind, and Alpine.js.

This is the open source website for PhilaCon Valley. It was built collaboratively at our Collab Labs and is a great first project to contribute to.

## How to Contribute

Check out the [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/philaconvalley/website/blob/main/docs/contributing.md) to get started.

A beginner-friendly guide to making your first open source contribution.

## What is Open Source?

Open source means the code is publicly available for anyone to view, use, modify, and share. This website is open source!

## Making Your First Contribution

1. Find a project with a `good first issue` label
2. Fork the repository
3. Make your change
4. Open a pull request

That's it — you're now an open source contributor.

Introducing our community and what we are building together in Philadelphia.

PhilaCon Valley is a community-driven tech organization centering Black, Brown, LGBTQIA+, and underrepresented folks in tech. We are building the Philadelphia tech hub we want to see -- by us, for us.

## What We Do

We host Collab Labs, workshops, and career support sessions across Philadelphia. Everything is free, hands-on, and open to all skill levels.

## Get Involved

- Attend an event on [Luma](https://lu.ma/philaconvalley)
- Join our Slack community
- Contribute to our [open source projects](https://github.com/philaconvalley)

This is just the beginning. Stay tuned for event recaps, member spotlights, and community updates.
